images.description: A woman in business attire stands at a podium in a government building, speaking into a microphone. Behind her is a banner reading 'City Housing Summit 2026.' She is gesturing with her right hand.
A construction site showing the steel frame of a multi-story building with workers visible on the upper floors. Cranes in the background.
images.who: Workers at the River District affordable housing project
images.where: River District, south side of the city

input.article_context: Feature on the city's affordable housing initiative

images.description: A firefighter sprays water on a burning warehouse from a ladder truck
Two leaders shaking hands in front of EU and national flags. One is a woman in a dark suit, the other a man in a blue tie.
images.who: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen and French President Emmanuel Macron

input.article_context: Analysis of Franco-German relations and EU reform
